panels.title: L0 · Planejamento por site (formato planilha — selecione $site)

targets.query:
from(bucket: "nsx_capacity")
  |> range(start: -10m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nsx_t1_totals" and r._field == "total")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site =~ /^${site:regex}$/)
  |> last()
  |> group()
  |> sum()

from(bucket: "nsx_capacity")
  |> range(start: -10m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nsx_t1_totals" and r._field == "total")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site =~ /^${site:regex}$/)
  |> last()
  |> group()
  |> count()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: ${t1_target}.0}))

atual = from(bucket: "nsx_capacity") |> range(start: -10m) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nsx_t1_totals" and r._field == "total") |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site =~ /^${site:regex}$/) |> last() |> group() |> sum() |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)
from(bucket: "nsx_capacity") |> range(start: -1m) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nsx_t1_totals" and r._field == "total") |> last() |> limit(n: 1) |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: atual._value - ${t1_target}.0}))

import "math"

// 1) Snapshot atual: current_usage + max_supported por (site, usage_type),
//    agregado cross-site (soma) por usage_type.
now_agg = from(bucket: "nsx_capacity")
  |> range(start: -10m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nsx_capacity")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "current_usage" or r._field == "max_supported")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.usage_type =~ /^(NUMBER_OF_LOGICAL_SWITCHES|NUMBER_OF_TIER1_ROUTERS|NUMBER_OF_NAT_RULES|NUMBER_OF_LOGICAL_PORTS|NUMBER_OF_GROUPS_BASED_ON_IP_SETS)$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site =~ /^${site:regex}$/)
  |> last()
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["site","usage_type","display_name"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> group(columns: ["usage_type","display_name"])
  |> reduce(
       identity: {atual: 0.0, limite: 0.0},
       fn: (r, accumulator) => ({
         atual:  accumulator.atual  + r.current_usage,
         limite: accumulator.limite + r.max_supported,
       }))
  |> group()

// 2) Snapshot passado: média da janela [${proj_start}, ${proj_stop}].
past_agg = from(bucket: "nsx_capacity")
  |> range(start: ${proj_start}, stop: ${proj_stop})
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nsx_capacity" and r._field == "current_usage")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.usage_type =~ /^(NUMBER_OF_LOGICAL_SWITCHES|NUMBER_OF_TIER1_ROUTERS|NUMBER_OF_NAT_RULES|NUMBER_OF_LOGICAL_PORTS|NUMBER_OF_GROUPS_BASED_ON_IP_SETS)$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site =~ /^${site:regex}$/)
  |> mean()
  |> group(columns: ["usage_type"])
  |> sum()
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "atual_passado"})
  |> group()
  |> keep(columns: ["usage_type","atual_passado"])

// 3) Conta VRFs distintas no(s) site(s) — denominador "Por cliente".
vrf_count_raw = from(bucket: "nsx_capacity")
  |> range(start: -10m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nsx_t1_per_vrf" and r._field == "t1_count")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site =~ /^${site:regex}$/)
  |> last()
  |> group()
  |> count()
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

safe_vrf = if exists vrf_count_raw._value and vrf_count_raw._value > 0 then float(v: vrf_count_raw._value) else 1.0

// 4) Join atual + passado, calcula projeção e número final.
join(tables: {a: now_agg, b: past_agg}, on: ["usage_type"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with
         por_cliente: math.round(x: r.atual / safe_vrf * 100.0) / 100.0,
         projecao:    r.atual - r.atual_passado,
         numero_final: r.atual + (r.atual - r.atual_passado),
       }))
  |> keep(columns: ["display_name","limite","atual","por_cliente","projecao","numero_final"])
  |> rename(columns: {display_name: "Indicador", limite: "Limite", atual: "Nº Atual", por_cliente: "Por cliente", projecao: "Projeção", numero_final: "Número final"})
  |> sort(columns: ["Indicador"])

from(bucket: "nsx_capacity")
  |> range(start: -10m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nsx_t1_totals" and r._field == "total")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site =~ /^${site:regex}$/)
  |> last()

from(bucket: "nsx_capacity")
  |> range(start: -10m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nsx_t1_totals" and r._field == "on_vrf")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site =~ /^${site:regex}$/)
  |> last()

from(bucket: "nsx_capacity")
  |> range(start: -10m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nsx_capacity" and r._field == "usage_pct")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site =~ /^${site:regex}$/)
  |> group()
  |> max()

from(bucket: "nsx_capacity")
  |> range(start: -10m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nsx_lb_credits" and r._field == "usage_pct" and r.scope == "manager")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site =~ /^${site:regex}$/)
  |> last()

from(bucket: "nsx_capacity")
  |> range(start: -10m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nsx_lb_credits" and r._field == "nodes_red" and r.scope == "manager")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site =~ /^${site:regex}$/)
  |> last()

from(bucket: "nsx")
  |> range(start: -10m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nsx_alarm" and r._field == "severity_num")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.feature_name =~ /(?i)capacity/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site =~ /^${site:regex}$/)
  |> group()
  |> count()

from(bucket: "nsx_capacity")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nsx_capacity")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "usage_pct")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site =~ /^${site:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.usage_type =~ /^(NUMBER_OF_TIER1_ROUTERS|NUMBER_OF_TIER0_ROUTERS|NUMBER_OF_TIER1_WITH_NAT_RULE|NUMBER_OF_PREFIX_LIST)$/)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: r.display_name + " (" + r.site + ")"}))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])

panels.title: T1 por T0 (não-VRF) — current vs limite

targets.query:
from(bucket: "nsx_capacity")
  |> range(start: -10m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nsx_t1_per_t0")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site =~ /^${site:regex}$/)
  |> last()
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["site","t0_name"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> sort(columns: ["usage_pct"], desc: true)

panels.title: T1 por VRF — current vs limite preestabelecido

targets.query:
from(bucket: "nsx_capacity")
  |> range(start: -10m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nsx_t1_per_vrf")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site =~ /^${site:regex}$/)
  |> last()
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["site","vrf_name","t0_parent"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> sort(columns: ["usage_pct"], desc: true)

panels.title: L3 · Firewall / DFW / NAT (NAT em 85% no TESP3!)

targets.query:
from(bucket: "nsx_capacity")
  |> range(start: -10m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nsx_capacity")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.usage_type == "NUMBER_OF_NAT_RULES")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site =~ /^${site:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "usage_pct")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "nsx_capacity")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nsx_capacity")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "usage_pct")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site =~ /^${site:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.usage_type =~ /^(NUMBER_OF_FIREWALL_RULES|NUMBER_OF_FIREWALL_SECTIONS|NUMBER_OF_DFW_RULES|NUMBER_OF_DFW_SECTIONS|NUMBER_OF_NAT_RULES)$/)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: r.display_name + " (" + r.site + ")"}))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])

from(bucket: "nsx_capacity")
  |> range(start: -10m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nsx_fw_per_gateway")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site =~ /^${site:regex}$/)
  |> last()
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["site","gateway_kind","gateway_name"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> sort(columns: ["fw_rules"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 50)

panels.title: Top NAT rules por T1 (quando collect_nat_per_t1=true)

from(bucket: "nsx_capacity")

  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "usage_pct")

  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.usage_type =~ /^(NUMBER_OF_LOGICAL_SWITCHES|NUMBER_OF_LOGICAL_PORTS)$/)

from(bucket: "nsx_capacity")

from(bucket: "nsx_capacity")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)

  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "usage_pct")

  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: r.display_name + " (" + r.site + ")"}))

from(bucket: "nsx_capacity")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nsx_groups_inventory")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site =~ /^${site:regex}$/)

from(bucket: "nsx_capacity")
  |> range(start: -10m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nsx_lb_credits" and r._field == "used_credits" and r.scope == "manager")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site =~ /^${site:regex}$/)

from(bucket: "nsx_capacity")

panels.title: LB credits por edge node (size + severity)

targets.query:
from(bucket: "nsx_capacity")
  |> range(start: -10m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nsx_lb_credits" and r.scope == "edge_node")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site =~ /^${site:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "usage_pct" or r._field == "used_credits" or r._field == "credit_capacity" or r._field == "severity_num" or r._field == "small_lb_count" or r._field == "medium_lb_count" or r._field == "large_lb_count" or r._field == "xlarge_lb_count" or r._field == "pool_members_used")
  |> last()
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["site","edge_cluster_id","node_id","form_factor"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> sort(columns: ["usage_pct"], desc: true)

from(bucket: "nsx_capacity")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nsx_capacity")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "usage_pct")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site =~ /^${site:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.usage_type =~ /^(NUMBER_OF_EDGE_NODES|NUMBER_OF_EDGE_CLUSTERS|NUMBER_OF_PREPARED_HOSTS|NUMBER_OF_VCENTER_CLUSTERS|NUMBER_OF_COMPUTE_MANAGER)$/)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: r.display_name + " (" + r.site + ")"}))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])

panels.title: L8 · SI / Identity FW / Endpoint (colapsada — TESP3 está 0%)

targets.query:
from(bucket: "nsx_capacity")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nsx_capacity")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "usage_pct")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site =~ /^${site:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.usage_type =~ /^(NUMBER_OF_SI_SECTIONS|NUMBER_OF_SI_RULES|NUMBER_OF_SI_SERVICE_CHAINS|NUMBER_OF_SI_SERVICE_PATHS|NUMBER_OF_ACTIVE_DIRECTORY_DOMAINS|NUMBER_OF_ACTIVE_DIRECTORY_GROUPS|NUMBER_OF_GI_PROTECTED_VMS|NUMBER_OF_GI_PROTECTED_HOSTS)$/)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: r.display_name + " (" + r.site + ")"}))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])

from(bucket: "nsx_capacity")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nsx_capacity")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "usage_pct")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site =~ /^${site:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.usage_type =~ /^(NUMBER_OF_DHCP_IP_POOLS|NUMBER_OF_DHCP_V6_IP_POOLS|NUMBER_OF_DHCP_SERVERS)$/)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: r.display_name + " (" + r.site + ")"}))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])

panels.title: A1 · Headroom absoluto por dimensão (max - current)

targets.query:
from(bucket: "nsx_capacity")
  |> range(start: -10m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nsx_capacity" and (r._field == "current_usage" or r._field == "max_supported"))
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site =~ /^${site:regex}$/)
  |> last()
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["site","usage_type","display_name"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with headroom: r.max_supported - r.current_usage}))
  |> sort(columns: ["headroom"], desc: false)

last = from(bucket: "nsx_capacity") |> range(start: -10m) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nsx_capacity" and r._field == "current_usage") |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site =~ /^${site:regex}$/) |> last() |> keep(columns: ["site","usage_type","display_name","_value"]) |> rename(columns: {_value: "now"})
day = from(bucket: "nsx_capacity") |> range(start: -25h, stop: -23h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nsx_capacity" and r._field == "current_usage") |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site =~ /^${site:regex}$/) |> mean() |> keep(columns: ["site","usage_type","_value"]) |> rename(columns: {_value: "day_ago"})
join(tables: {a: last, b: day}, on: ["site","usage_type"]) |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with delta_24h: r.now - r.day_ago})) |> sort(columns: ["delta_24h"], desc: true) |> limit(n: 10)

panels.title: A4 · Δ7d / Δ30d / Δ90d por dimensão

targets.query:
now7 = from(bucket: "nsx_capacity") |> range(start: -10m) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nsx_capacity" and r._field == "current_usage") |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site =~ /^${site:regex}$/) |> last() |> keep(columns: ["site","usage_type","display_name","_value"]) |> rename(columns: {_value: "now"})
 d7 = from(bucket: "nsx_capacity") |> range(start: -7d, stop: -6d23h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nsx_capacity" and r._field == "current_usage") |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site =~ /^${site:regex}$/) |> mean() |> keep(columns: ["site","usage_type","_value"]) |> rename(columns: {_value: "d7"})
d30 = from(bucket: "nsx_capacity") |> range(start: -30d, stop: -29d23h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nsx_capacity" and r._field == "current_usage") |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site =~ /^${site:regex}$/) |> mean() |> keep(columns: ["site","usage_type","_value"]) |> rename(columns: {_value: "d30"})
d90 = from(bucket: "nsx_capacity") |> range(start: -90d, stop: -89d23h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nsx_capacity" and r._field == "current_usage") |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site =~ /^${site:regex}$/) |> mean() |> keep(columns: ["site","usage_type","_value"]) |> rename(columns: {_value: "d90"})
 j1 = join(tables: {a: now7, b: d7}, on: ["site","usage_type"])
 j2 = join(tables: {a: j1, b: d30}, on: ["site","usage_type"])
 j3 = join(tables: {a: j2, b: d90}, on: ["site","usage_type"])
 j3 |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with delta_7d: r.now - r.d7, delta_30d: r.now - r.d30, delta_90d: r.now - r.d90})) |> sort(columns: ["delta_7d"], desc: true)

panels.title: A5 · Onboarding capacity estimada (VRFs com folga)

targets.query: live = from(bucket: "nsx_capacity") |> range(start: -10m) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nsx_t1_per_vrf" and (r._field == "t1_count" or r._field == "limit")) |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site =~ /^${site:regex}$/) |> last() |> pivot(rowKey: ["site","vrf_name"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value") |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with slack: r.limit - r.t1_count})) |> filter(fn: (r) => r.slack > 0) |> group() |> sum(column: "slack")

panels.title: B · Ranking por consumidor (multi-tenant / por VRF / por T0)

targets.query:
from(bucket: "nsx_capacity")
  |> range(start: -10m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nsx_t1_per_vrf" and r._field == "t1_count")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site =~ /^${site:regex}$/)
  |> last()
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_value"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 20)
  |> keep(columns: ["site","vrf_name","_value"])
  |> rename(columns: {vrf_name: "_field"})

panels.title: B5 · Top 10 T0 clusters por #T1 + LB credits + NAT

targets.query: from(bucket: "nsx_capacity") |> range(start: -10m) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nsx_t1_per_t0") |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site =~ /^${site:regex}$/) |> last() |> pivot(rowKey: ["site","t0_name"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value") |> group() |> sort(columns: ["t1_count"], desc: true) |> limit(n: 10)

panels.title: B6 · Distribuição small/medium/large/xlarge por edge node

targets.query: from(bucket: "nsx_capacity") |> range(start: -10m) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nsx_lb_credits" and r.scope == "edge_node") |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "small_lb_count" or r._field == "medium_lb_count" or r._field == "large_lb_count" or r._field == "xlarge_lb_count") |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site =~ /^${site:regex}$/) |> last() |> pivot(rowKey: ["site","edge_cluster_id","node_id","form_factor"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value") |> group() |> sort(columns: ["large_lb_count","medium_lb_count","small_lb_count"], desc: true)

from(bucket: "nsx")
  |> range(start: today())
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nsx_t1_event" and r.event == "created" and r._field == "count")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site =~ /^${site:regex}$/)

  |> sum()

from(bucket: "nsx")
  |> range(start: -7d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nsx_t1_event" and r.event == "created" and r._field == "count")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site =~ /^${site:regex}$/)
  |> group()
  |> sum()

from(bucket: "nsx")
  |> range(start: -7d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nsx_t1_event" and r.event == "deleted" and r._field == "count")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site =~ /^${site:regex}$/)

  |> sum()

panels.title: C4 · Timeline de eventos de T1 (criados/deletados)

targets.query:
from(bucket: "nsx")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nsx_t1_event" and r._field == "count")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site =~ /^${site:regex}$/)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: sum, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: r.event + " (" + r.site + ")"}))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time","_value","_field"])

panels.title: C5 · Atividade recente por edge cluster

targets.query:
from(bucket: "nsx")
  |> range(start: -7d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nsx_t1_event" and r.event == "created" and r._field == "count")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site =~ /^${site:regex}$/)
  |> group(columns: ["site","edge_cluster_name"])
  |> sum()
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_value"], desc: true)

panels.title: D2 · Groups vazios (orphan) — total por site

targets.query: from(bucket: "nsx_capacity") |> range(start: -10m) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nsx_groups_inventory" and r._field == "empty") |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site =~ /^${site:regex}$/) |> last() |> keep(columns: ["site","_value"])

panels.title: D4 · VRFs heatmap por % de utilização do limite

targets.query: from(bucket: "nsx_capacity") |> range(start: -10m) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nsx_t1_per_vrf") |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site =~ /^${site:regex}$/) |> last() |> pivot(rowKey: ["site","vrf_name"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value") |> filter(fn: (r) => r.usage_pct >= 50.0) |> sort(columns: ["usage_pct"], desc: true)

panels.title: D5 · Edge nodes subutilizados em LB (< 30%)

targets.query: from(bucket: "nsx_capacity") |> range(start: -10m) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nsx_lb_credits" and r.scope == "edge_node" and r._field == "usage_pct") |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site =~ /^${site:regex}$/) |> last() |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value < 30.0) |> sort(columns: ["_value"], desc: false) |> keep(columns: ["site","edge_cluster_id","node_id","form_factor","_value"])

from(bucket: "nsx_capacity") |> range(start: -10m) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nsx_lb_credits" and r.scope == "edge_node" and r._field == "severity_num") |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site =~ /^${site:regex}$/) |> last() |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value >= 3.0) |> keep(columns: ["site","edge_cluster_id","node_id","form_factor"])

from(bucket: "nsx_capacity") |> range(start: -10m) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nsx_capacity" and r._field == "usage_pct") |> last() |> pivot(rowKey: ["site"], columnKey: ["display_name"], valueColumn: "_value")

panels.title: E2 · Site mais saturado (max % entre dimensões)

targets.query: from(bucket: "nsx_capacity") |> range(start: -10m) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nsx_capacity" and r._field == "usage_pct") |> last() |> group(columns: ["site"]) |> max() |> group() |> sort(columns: ["_value"], desc: true) |> limit(n: 1)

panels.title: E3 · Crescimento por site últimos 30d (T1 total)

targets.query:
from(bucket: "nsx_capacity")
  |> range(start: -30d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nsx_t1_totals" and r._field == "total")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 6h, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time","_value","site"])
  |> rename(columns: {site: "_field"})
